privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic GNU Health demo database. The target patient is explicitly queried as John Zenon via setup and export scripts. The required Hypersensitivity Pneumonitis diagnosis must map to the J67 ICD-10 prefix. The verifier requires at least 2 diagnostic lab tests, a follow-up appointment between 14 and 28 days, and clinical evaluations noting respiratory distress (RR >= 22 and O2 <= 94). While the metadata claims 4 steroid options, the export logic actually accepts 6 (including dexamethasone and hydrocortisone). Additionally, the setup script intentionally injects a false J67 diagnosis onto patient Ana Betz as a distractor.
